Our Story

Gupta Chess Academy – A Legacy of Excellence

Founded with a vision to nurture champions, our academy started with a small passionate batch and has grown into one of Bangalore's leading chess institutions. We've trained students across all age groups and skill levels, producing district and state-level finalists.

We believe chess is more than a game — it's a tool for developing critical thinking, patience, and discipline. Our teaching philosophy blends classical methodology with modern software analysis.

The Story Behind It All

How Chess Found Its Way Into My Life

Chess has been a hobby of mine since childhood — and the story behind it is quite interesting. On my birthday, my cousin gifted me a chessboard, unaware that my father was proficient in the game himself, though he had never mentioned it to me. That chessboard changed everything.

My father began teaching me. Like any beginner, I lost continuity early on. When I turned 10, I started assisting him in his transportation business, gradually taking on more responsibility as I grew older.

During one of his trips out of town, he entrusted me with managing things — and that proved to be a turning point in more ways than one. I began playing chess with one of the truck drivers who happened to be exceptionally skilled at the game.

Eventually, I expressed my desire to compete in the district chess championship. My father supported the decision. In that tournament, I secured 4th position at the district level — and that marked the true beginning of my journey in competitive chess.

Since then, I have been consistently participating in tournaments, striving to improve with every game. That same drive — to learn, to grow, to compete — is what I now bring to every student I coach.

🏆
District Championship Debut
4th place finish that sparked a lifelong competitive chess journey — from a small town to national tournaments.
Our Approach

Chess Lessons Designed to Transform How You Think

Training with us means learning directly from experienced players. Our approach blends professional tournament experience with student-centered coaching — every lesson is practical, engaging, and tailored to your goals.

3 Pillars of Our Teaching
1
Diagnostic AssessmentWe analyse your games to identify strengths, blind spots, and goals before building your learning plan.
2
Skill-Specific DrillsFrom opening traps to endgame mastery — every lesson targets your biggest opportunities for growth.
3
Real-World ApplicationStrategies tested in live games, turning theory into muscle memory that lasts.
A Typical Class (60 min)
10 min
Warm-Up Tactical puzzles to sharpen pattern recognition
30 min
Core Lesson Positional play, time management, or match psychology
15 min
Live Practice Apply concepts in a simulated game with real-time feedback
5 min
Homework Curated puzzles, annotated GM games, or tournament prep
Who Thrives in Our Classes
♙
BeginnersMaster piece coordination and basic checkmates in a supportive environment.
♗
Intermediate PlayersBreak plateaus with advanced tactics — sacrifices, zugzwang, prophylaxis.
♜
CompetitorsBuild bulletproof opening repertoires and endgame databases.
♛
Lifelong LearnersBoost memory, focus, and creativity through chess's infinite depth.
Why Our Approach Stands Out
✦
Tailored to YOULessons evolve as you progress — no generic curriculums, ever.
✦
Interactive ToolsLichess, Chess.com, Chessbase & AI-powered drills to accelerate learning.
✦
Monthly Progress ReviewsCelebrate wins and adjust strategies to keep improving consistently.
✦
Progress GuaranteeDon't feel sharper after 30 lessons? We redesign your plan at no cost.
